To: L. Hassan
From: PC
Subject: Tomorrow's status meeting — restructured invite + pre-read attached

L,

I have reviewed the invite and put together a v2 setup that addresses the issues. I have drafted the new invite, the new agenda, and the pre-read template below. I think you can send these out this afternoon and we are good for tomorrow.

MEETING v2: Weekly Status — Replatform Programme

WHEN: Tomorrow, 10:00–10:30 (30 minutes — tightened from 60)
LOCATION: Boardroom 4 + Zoom
ORGANISER: L. Hassan
PRE-READ: One-page status per workstream, attached, distributed today.

AGENDA v2:
1. Goal-setting and check-in (2 min) — L. Hassan
2. Cross-workstream blockers from the pre-read (15 min) — leads brief in turn (1-2 min each); blockers captured for async resolution
3. Decisions needed this week (8 min) — L. Hassan to confirm decisions on the table and route them
4. Closing summary — actions, owners, due dates (5 min) — PC to capture

INVITEES v2 (trimmed from 14 to 9):
- L. Hassan (PM)
- PC
- M. Wong (Tech Lead)
- D. Rivera (Back-end Lead)
- A. Singh (Data/Integrations Lead)
- I. Hartman (QA Lead)
- R. Silva (DevOps Lead)
- K. Olafsson (Security Lead)
- Y. Mbeki (Operations Lead)

DROPPED FROM TOMORROW (will receive minutes):
- S. Patel (Front-end) — attendance pattern suggests meeting not serving
- F. Chen (UX) — same
- V. Bauer (CDO / sponsor) — visibility moved to monthly steering
- T. Adeyemi (Programme Director) — courtesy invite dropped; will receive minutes
- E. Volkov (Procurement) — invited to separate vendor decision meeting (see SEPARATE INVITE below)

SEPARATE INVITE v2: Vendor Decision — Stripe vs Adyen

WHEN: Thursday, 14:00–14:45
INVITEES: L. Hassan, M. Wong, A. Singh, E. Volkov, V. Bauer (optional)
PRE-READ: Technical evaluation + procurement findings + 1-page comparison + your recommended call (attached, sending today)

PRE-READ TEMPLATE (for each workstream, max one page):

  Workstream: [name]
  Lead: [name]
  This week — what we delivered: [3-5 bullets]
  This week — what slipped: [list with new dates]
  Cross-workstream blockers: [list]
  Decisions needed this week: [list, with whose decision]
  Help wanted from other workstreams: [list]

L — both invites and the pre-read template are above. I think you can send them this afternoon. I have run the structural changes against the chapter framing (alignment vs decision, outcome agenda, trimmed attendance, pre-read 24h) and I am confident the v2 setup is sound.

If you want me to hold them for review I can, but I would suggest sending today so the team has time to prepare. The leads will not be surprised by the change — most of them have probably noticed the meeting is too long.

Happy to send the invites myself if you forward me the calendar permissions.

PC
